canonical_definition: A 3D open-world video game environment used as a platform for evaluating generally capable agents on tasks involving resource gathering, crafting, and exploration.
papers: ADAM: An Embodied Causal Agent in Open-World Environments
NeSyC: A Neuro-symbolic Continual Learner For Complex Embodied Tasks in Open Domains
